originalTitle: Women secretly filmed, then ridiculed and abused online
title: Women secretly filmed, then ridiculed and abused online
content: Women in Kenya and Ghana tell the BBC about being approached by a Russian man who later posts videos of them without their consent.

originalTitle: South Africa's exclusion from G7 summit no surprise, says Ramaphosa
title: South Africa's exclusion from G7 summit no surprise, says Ramaphosa
content: Reports say the US pressured France to rescind Ramaphosa’s invitation after Trump threatened to boycott the summit.

originalTitle: Rationing power and diluting petrol - how African countries are coping with effects of Iran war
title: Rationing power and diluting petrol - how African countries are coping with effects of Iran war
content: The disruption in oil supplies has caused shortages and concerns in several African countries.

originalTitle: Wildlife killed, reefs damaged in ‘active’ Gulf of Mexico oil spill
title: Wildlife killed, reefs damaged in ‘active’ Gulf of Mexico oil spill
content: Authorities say the oil is seeping from three sources, including a vessel that has not yet been identified.

originalTitle: India lowers fuel taxes, says rumours of lockdown ‘completely false’
title: India lowers fuel taxes, says rumours of lockdown ‘completely false’
content: India, the world's third biggest crude importer, announces measures amid shortages created by the Iran war.

originalTitle: War on Iran price crisis not just about energy, says analyst
title: War on Iran price crisis not just about energy, says analyst
content: Abdulla Banndar Al-Etaibi, says the disruption of fertiliser supplies due to the war on Iran will push food prices up.

originalTitle: 'My daughter is under the rubble': Inside Tehran as civilian toll of strikes rises
title: 'My daughter is under the rubble': Inside Tehran as civilian toll of strikes rises
content: One month since the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran, Tehran residents tell the BBC their lives have been devastated.

originalTitle: Marco Rubio meets G7 counterparts amid Iran war
title: Marco Rubio meets G7 counterparts amid Iran war
content: It is the secretary of state's first foreign trip since the conflict began last month.

originalTitle: Panic buying prompts PM to reassure Australians over fuel supply
title: Panic buying prompts PM to reassure Australians over fuel supply
content: Anthony Albanese says nation's supply remains "secure" amid reports of panic buying and shortages.

originalTitle: Bellamy rues chaos against Bosnia as Wales' World Cup dream ends
title: Bellamy rues chaos against Bosnia as Wales' World Cup dream ends
content: Head coach Craig Bellamy rues the chaos of Wales' World Cup play-off semi-final loss to Bosnia-Herzegovina - but says his team have a bright future.

originalTitle: What next for Northern Ireland as World Cup wait continues?
title: What next for Northern Ireland as World Cup wait continues?
content: Manager Michael O'Neill says he is positive for the future despite a World Cup play-off defeat by Italy in Bergamo, and questions about his own long-term plans.

originalTitle: 'Copying Arsenal set-piece kings can win England World Cup'
title: 'Copying Arsenal set-piece kings can win England World Cup'
content: Former England goalkeeper Paul Robinson says set-piece expertise could give Thomas Tuchel's side an X-factor this summer.
